members.name: @wizard
members.role: Scholar of the Deep Code & Search

magic_items_acquired.powers: Allows the user to peer into remote repositories and servers (like ecris.lbl.gov) with perfect clarity.
When used on a monolithic script, it automatically carves out clean, decoupled packages and modules.

quest_successes: Transformation of a flat project into a professional, portable Python package.
Implementation of a 'Cassette Futurism' GUI using high-performance QSS styling.
Integration of remote CSD data streaming and local file caching.
Creation of a specialized 'Peak Identification' mode with hotkey-driven workflow.
Establishment of a robust, m/q calibrated spectral analysis engine.
